rabbit-rice-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Rabbit Rice In The Oven
instructions: Cut the rabbit into small pieces. Peel and chop the onions and cut the sausage into little pieces.
Light a pot with the olive oil, add the onion and let it shine. Add the sausage and then the rabbit and wrap.
Add the rice, water with red wine, add the water and rosemary and season with salt and pepper.
When the broth is boiling, put everything on a tray, cover well with aluminium foil and bring it to the oven, preheated to 180°C for about 20 minutes.

radicchio-and-citrus-salad-with-burrata.name: Radicchio And Citrus Salad With Burrata

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Toast almonds in a dry medium skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until beginning to brown in spots, about 3 minutes. Add 1 tsp. sugar, 1/4 tsp. salt, and 2 Tbsp. water. Remove from heat and stir with a heatproof rubber spatula until water is evaporated. Sprinkle in remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar and stir until almonds are coated. Transfer to a plate and let cool. Coarsely chop.

Meanwhile, pulse burrata in a food processor to a coarse purée. It should look a little like cottage cheese. Add 2 Tbsp. oil and season with salt; pulse just to incorporate. (Or you can tear it with your hands, arrange on plates, and drizzle with the oil and sprinkle with salt.)
Toss oranges, radicchio, vinegar, and remaining 4 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl to combine; season with salt.
Divide burrata among plates and sprinkle with herbes de Provence; top with salad. Scatter almonds over.

25. You can decorate the prepared cake with different cake decorations.

ramen-noodle-bowl-with-escarole-and-spic.name: Ramen Noodle Bowl With Escarole And Spicy Tofu Crumbles

ingredients.item: -ounce servings fresh or dried ramen noodles

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced radish, and chopped peanuts (for serving)

instructions: Cook noodles according to package directions. During the last minute of cooking, add escarole. Drain and rinse under cold water.

Toss noodles, escarole, and chili sauce in a large bowl until coated; season with salt. Divide noodles between bowls. Slice scallions into 1" pieces and place on top of noodles along with some tofu crumbles, radishes, and peanuts.

raspberry-and-chocolate-tart-lezzet.name: Raspberry And Chocolate Tart
instructions: 1. Take the butter, powder sugar, eggs, vanilla, flour and salt dough kneading container.
2. Wrap knead dough stretch foil with quick movements.
3. Wait for 1 hour in refrigerator.
4. The dough is larger than the weighing die and broadcast in-oiled weighing mold.
5. Cut the excess on the edges with the blade.
6. Oiled paper on the dough and sprinkle dry pulse.
7. Pre-heated 180 degree cook in oven for 15 minutes.
8. Remove oily paper and dry tear and cook for 10 minutes.
9. Provide weighing from the oven to the room heat.
10. To prepare chocolate and frambuase filled, 180 gr frambuase and powder sugar into the ezip tart pulp with the help of a fork.
11. 200 gr of chocolate and butter breeze to melt with mymariher and cool a little.
12. Beat eggs, egg yolks and sugar in a bowl.
12. August Add and mix chocolate mixture into eggs with the help of a spatula.
14 July Pour the mixture on the base you spread frambuaz and straighten it.
15. Bake for 20 minutes in the oven of 180 degrees.
16. Take the oven and heat the room.
17. September Mix and blend dust sugar and frambuases.
18. Wait for 1 hour on or on the room temperature.
19. September Serve and serve.

raspberry-sweet-rolls.name: Raspberry Sweet Rolls
instructions: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment, combine warm milk, yeast and 1 tablespoon of the sugar. Cover with a clean towel and set aside until yeast is foamy and smells like bread, about 5 minutes. (If the mixture does not foam after 10 minutes, it is dead and you should start over with new yeast). Add remaining sugar, flour, eggs, and salt, and mix on medium speed until the ingredients pull away from the sides of the bowl cleanly, about 2 minutes. (It’s okay for it to not pull into a clean mass around the dough hook at the bottom of the bowl. However, if dough doesn’t pull away cleanly from sides, add more flour 1 tablespoon at a time, kneading for 30 seconds in between additions, until it does.) With the mixer running, add butter, 1 tablespoon at a time, and knead until it is incorporated into the dough before adding another. Once all butter is added, knead on medium for 2 to 3 minutes more, until dough is smooth and supple.
Transfer dough to a greased bowl and cover with plastic wrap or a lid. Set aside in a warm place to rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.

While dough rises, whisk together cornstarch and lemon juice in a medium bowl until no lumps remain. Add jam, and whisk until well combined. Microwave for 2 minutes, then whisk well. Microwave 2 minutes more (filling should be bubbling when you remove it from the microwave; if it’s not, continue to microwave in 1 minute increments until it does), then whisk again and set aside to cool to room temperature. (This step can be accelerated by refrigerating the filling.)
Once dough is risen, punch it down and transfer it to a lightly floured surface. Roll out into a 24x12-inch rectangle.
Dollop the jam filling evenly over the surface and spread into an even layer with an offset spatula.

Roll the dough into a tight log lengthwise, then cut into 12 equal sections using a serrated knife. Place rolls in a greased 9x13-inch baking pan, cover with greased plastic wrap, and let rise again until puffy, about 30 minutes.

While the rolls are rising, preheat the oven to 177°C and make the glaze. Whisk together powdered sugar and heavy cream in a medium bowl until smooth. Add jam and fold gently a few times, but be careful not to over mix. Set aside.
Once rolls are risen, bake until tops are golden brown and internal temperature reads 88°C on an instant read thermometer, about 30 minutes.
Place rolls on a wire rack and cool for 15 to 20 minutes. Pour glaze evenly over top, and spread with an offset spatula. Serve warm.

recado-de-pepian-indio-guatemalan-pepian.name: Recado De Pepian Indio (guatemalan Pepian Indio Sauce)
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat; place tomatoes, tomatillos, onion, and garlic into the hot skillet and stir until vegetables are lightly charred, about 20 minutes. Remove vegetables from skillet; stir sesame and pumpkin seeds into the hot skillet, stirring until seeds are lightly toasted, 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from heat.

Toast baguette slice in a toaster. Place baguette slice, tomatoes, onion, garlic, sesame seeds, cilantro, salt, and black peppercorns into a blender; pulse several times to chop, then blend the mixture until smooth. Pour 3 cups chicken broth into blender and puree again.

Strain blended sauce through a sieve and pour into a large saucepan; stir olive oil into sauce. Place over medium-high heat, bring to a boil, and cook for 3 minutes. Stir chayote, potatoes, and corn into sauce; stir in 3 cups chicken broth. Bring back to a boil, reduce heat to low, and simmer until chayote and potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.

recipe-dreams-teleculinaria.name: Recipe Dreams
instructions: In a pan, add the water and the margarine. It leads to the fire and when it starts to boil add the flour at once. Shake well until the dough is cooked and homogeneous.
Remove and let the dough cool in a bowl. When it is cold, put the eggs together, one by one and always kneading with your hand until you get a soft cream.
Heat the oil and fry spoonfuls of this prepared until golden. After fried, pass the dreams through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and serve.

recipe-for-baked-chicken-and-spinach-com.name: Recipe For Baked Chicken And Spinach
recipe-for-baked-chicken-and-spinach-com.original_name: Receta de con pollo y espinacas al horno

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de pechuga de pollo cocida y picada en cubos
1 taza de espinacas cocidas y escurridas
1(2 taza de cebolla morada en juliana
1/2 taza de pimiento verde en cubos
1 taza de queso feta en cubos

instructions: It purifies the oven to 182 been 3 been

En una fuente para el horno agrega la pasta en espiral cocida, la pechuga de pollo en cubos, el tomate, las espinacas cocidas, la cebolla morada, el pimiento verde, las aceitunas negras y mezcla bien.
Incorpora la salsa de tomate y mezcla nuevamente
Espolvorea por encima el queso mozzarella cubriendo toda la superficie.
Hornea for 15 minutes, or till the cheese's golden and bubbling. Remove from the oven and serve hot, adding feta cheese above as a final touch.

recipe-for-baked-endives-with-ham-comede.name: Recipe For Baked Endives With Ham
recipe-for-baked-endives-with-ham-comede.original_name: Receta de endivias al horno con jamón

ingredients.item: 4 pieces of baked ham (can be serrane or Iberic ham for a more intense touch))
100 g of grated cheese (emmental, grouyère or parmesan)

instructions: Wash the props, remove the outside leaves if damaged and cut the base if necessary.
Fitted with salt water for 10 minutes or till tender. Listen to them and get them with absorbing paper.
It wraps each envil into a plate of baked ham and puts them into an oven fountain previously frosted with some olive oil.
In a saucer, melt the butter and add the flour, stirring constantly to form a roux.
Incorporates milk little by little, while at the same time bawling, to get a homogenous salsa.
Condimenta con sal, pimienta y nuez moscada al gusto.
Cocina hasta que espese ligeramente y luego retira del fuego.
Fold the bechamel onto the envil wrapped with ham.
Espolvorea el queso rallado por encima.
Hornea at 200 ″ 3 ″ for 15-20 minutes, till the cheese is matted and golden.
Retira del horno y deja reposar unos minutos antes de servir.

recipe-for-turkey-breasts-stuffed-with-q.name: Recipe For Turkey Breasts Stuffed With Quinoa And Fruits
recipe-for-turkey-breasts-stuffed-with-q.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pavo rellenas de quinoa y frutas

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de caldo de pollo o verduras

instructions: Lava muy bien la quinoa y ponla en una olla con el caldo de pollo o verduras. Sazona con un poco de sal y mezcla.
Cooking till the quinoa's ready and ready. Turn and put them out.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Sazona con sal y pimienta las pechugas de pavo por ambos lados. Reserva.
Remove the apple stem and cut into small cubes. Warm a frying pan with olive oil and give some fruit.
In a bowl, it incorporates quinoa, golden apple, dehydrated cranberries, broken nuts. Salt and pepper and rosemary. That's a good mix.
Rellena las pechugas de pavo con la mezcla de manzanas que acabas de hacer y enrolla. Sujeta con hilo pabilo y coloca en una bandeja.
Rocía with some olive oil and an about 25 to 30 minutes baker till they have been doradite and juicy.
Once ready, turn off and join with your favorite garrison.
Enjoy!

reisfladen-rice-pudding-cake.name: Reisfladen (rice Pudding Cake)
instructions: Combine 1/2 gallon milk, rice, and sugar in a slow cooker. Cook on High until rice is puffy but mixture is still thin, about 3 hours 15 minutes.

Mix 3 eggs, 1/4 cup milk, vanilla extract, and salt together in a bowl. Add 1/2 cup of the hot rice mixture, stirring in 1 tablespoon at a time, until blended. Pour mixture into the slow cooker, stirring constantly. Cook on Low until rice has absorbed all the liquid, about 30 minutes more. Let cool to room temperature, about 2 hours.

Meanwhile, place flour, yeast, sugars, egg, lukewarm milk, and melted butter in a bread machine in the order listed. Run Dough cycle. Remove dough from the machine after the cycle is done, about 90 minutes. Let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Butter an 11-inch springform pan. Smooth dough into the pan.
Whisk 2 eggs and brush all but 1 tablespoon onto the dough. Pour rice pudding onto the dough and brush top with remaining egg wash.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the cake layer comes out clean, about 25 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes and release cake from the pan. Let cool completely. Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, 6 hours to overnight.

rice-cooker-risotto.name: Rice Cooker Risotto

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about 1 cup); plus more for serving (optional)

ingredients.item: Mint leaves and extra-virgin olive oil

instructions: Combine 2 medium shallots, finely chopped, 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, 1½ cups arborio rice, ½ cup dry white wine, 2 cups low-sodium vegetable broth, 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper in a rice cooker. Close lid and set to cook on white rice setting.

As soon as timer goes off, switch rice cooker to warm (most models will do this automatically). Open rice cooker and add zest and juice of 1 lemon, 1 cup frozen peas, 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup), 1 cup low-sodium vegetable broth, and remaining 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter and stir until cheese and butter are melted and combined and mixture is creamy. Add more broth ¼-cupful at a time as needed until risotto is loosened to your desired consistency (this could be up to 1 cup more). Season with pepper and more salt if needed.
Divide risotto among bowls. Top with mint leaves and more Parmesan and drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil if desired.

rice-dessert-with-forest-fruits-lezzet.name: Rice Dessert With Forest Fruits
instructions: 1. Remember to add this special dessert to your list of recipes.
2. Milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon peel and boil the grated lemon peel into a large pot and in the middle fire.
3. Add rice and cook fire for 40 minutes.
4. Remove the rod vanilla and cinnamon from the dessert.
5. Add the dessert half of the forest fruits into the heat of the room.
6. Mix lightly and share bowls.
7. Wait for 3 hours in the refrigerator.
8. Decorate and serve the fruits remaining.

rice-pudding-with-cream-and-mastic-masti.name: Rice Pudding With Cream And Mastic Mastic
instructions: 1. Wash the rice with plenty of water and drain the water.
2. Add water until you go over and cook.
3. Mix and cook milk, sugar and rice in the pot.
4. Add and mix crushed drop gum when you start boiling.
5. melt the starch by adding water until it will pass over the panto plate.
6. Slowly stir and quickly to the pot that is slipped.
7. Add the cream after boiling for 2-3 minutes.
8. Cook the cookware for a few minutes and add vanilla into the stove.
9. Share the bowls.
10. Serve cinnamon on it.

rich-and-gooey-avocado-brownies.name: Rich And Gooey Avocado Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 8x8-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Scoop out avocado pulp and place into the bowl of a food processor. Add honey and sugar; blend until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla extract and blend, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed. Add flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt; pulse until blended.
Remove the blade from the food processor and scrape down the sides to ensure the batter is completely blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
Pour brownie mixture into the prepared baking dish and spread evenly using a spoon that has been sprayed with cooking spray.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 25 to 30 minutes.

ricotta-cheesecakes-teleculinaria.name: Ricotta Cheesecakes

ingredients.item: 50 g g g grated parmesan cheese

instructions: Start the oven at 190oC. Roughly pinch the pistachios and put in a processor or cook robot. Add the other ingredients and crush until you get a homogeneous consistency.
Distribua o preparado por forminhas para queques, previamente forradas com forminhas de papel frisado.
Decorate the center of each with a pistachio and take it to the oven for about 20 minutes. Stick a toothpick to check the cooking. Remove the cheeses from the oven, let it cool, peel and serve.

roast-pork-tenderloin-and-apples-with-mu.name: Roast Pork Tenderloin And Apples With Mushroom Sauté
instructions: Remove tenderloin from refrigerator about 30 minutes before cooking. Preheat oven to 350°. Season tenderloin generously with salt and pepper.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil over medium-high heat in a large ovenproof skillet. Add pork and apple wedges to skillet and cook, turning pork occasionally, until pork and apples are browned, 12–15 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven and roast until an instant-read thermometer inserted in center of pork registers 140°, 10–12 minutes. Transfer pork and apples to a plate along with any juices. Return skillet to stove-top.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until browned and tender, about 5 minutes. Add garlic, sage, and ½ cup water. Cook, stirring and scraping up any browned bits from bottom of skillet, until liquid is almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes. Add apples and any accumulated juices to skillet and toss to combine. Reserve 2–3 oz. pork and ¼ cup mushrooms for Pork, Mushroom, and Arugula Salad.
Serve pork with mushrooms and apples.

roasted-broccoli.name: Roasted Broccoli

ingredients.prep: cut into large florets with some stalk attached

instructions:
Preheat oven to 450°. Toss broccoli and oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and browned, 25–35 minutes.


Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published in November 2015. Head this way for more of our best vegetable recipes →

roasted-carrots-and-parsnips-with-white-.name: Roasted Carrots And Parsnips With White Balsamic
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Combine parsnips and carrots on large rimmed baking sheet. Add oil and remaining ingredients; toss to coat. Spread in even layer on baking sheet. Roast until vegetables are tender and brown around edges, stirring occasionally, about 50 minutes to 1 hour. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cool. Cover and chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour, then rewarm in 204°C oven for 15 minutes.

roasted-garlic-and-herb-pork-roast.name: Roasted Garlic And Herb Pork Roast
instructions: Preheat the oven 177°C (180°C). Line a small baking sheet with parchment paper.
Add the garlic to the baking sheet and coat with ½ teaspoon of olive oil. Roast for 10 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool. Once cool enough to handle, mince the garlic.

Place the Kroger® Boneless Whole Pork Tenderloin in a gallon-size resealable bag. Add the salt, black pepper, thyme, rosemary, sage, garlic powder, minced roasted garlic, Dijon mustard, and ¾ cup olive oil. Shake the bag until pork loin is well coated. Seal the bag and transfer to the refrigerator to marinate for 2 hours, or overnight.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).
Remove the pork loin from the marinade.
Heat the remaining 1 teaspoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Starting with the fattiest side, sear the pork loin on all sides until light golden brown, 2–3 minutes per side.

Transfer the seared pork loin to a 9x13” baking dish and cover with aluminum foil. Bake for 40 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for 5 minutes more, until the internal temperature reaches 63°C (63°C).

Meanwhile, make the gravy: Place the skillet used to sear the pork roast over medium heat. Melt the butter and add the rosemary, thyme, and garlic. Cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Whisk in the flour and cook until the flour turns golden brown in color, about 2 minutes. Deglaze the pan with the white wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom. Cook until reduced by half, about 45 seconds. Add the chicken stock and stir to combine, breaking up any clumps from the flour. Simmer for 3 minutes, or until the gravy thickens. Stir in the salt. Remove the thyme and rosemary sprigs, then strain the gravy through a fine-mesh sieve into a gravy boat or medium bowl. Keep warm until ready to serve.
Serve the pork roast warm with the garlic, herb gravy, and holiday vegetables of choice alongside.
Enjoy!

roasted-goat-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Roasted Goat In The Oven
instructions: Place the olive oil in a bowl, add the pepper dough, the crushed garlic, salt and pepper and stir it all very well. Involve the goat with 2/3 of this prepared.
Lave todas as batatas, corte as batatinhas ao meio e as batatas-doces em rodelas grossas. Descasque e corte a cebola em meias-luas e a cebola roxa em quartos. Limpe e corte os pimentos em rodelas.

Place the kid on a tray, have the chips and sweet potato around, as well as the onion, purple onion, thyme, rosemary and laurel leaf. Water with the rest of the seasoning and light in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 50 minutes.

roasted-ling-with-citrus-fruits-teleculi.name: Roasted Ling With Citrus Fruits
instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into pieces. Place the ling posts on a platter and season with 1/2 orange juice, 1/2 lemon juice, onion peeled and cut into rooms, salt, pepper, chives and the remaining lemon and orange cut into rooms.
Adicione as batatas e envolva tudo muito bem. Deixe marinar por cerca de 30 minutos.
Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. After the time indicated, water the fish with the olive oil and put it in the oven for 30 minutes. Remove and serve immediately.

Peel the potatoes and cut them into pieces. Place the ling posts on a platter and season with 1/2 orange juice, 1/2 lemon juice, onion peeled and cut into rooms, salt, pepper, chives and the remaining lemon and orange cut into rooms.
Adicione as batatas e envolva tudo muito bem. Deixe marinar por cerca de 30 minutos.
Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. After the time indicated, water the fish with the olive oil and put it in the oven for 30 minutes. Remove and serve immediately.

roasted-pork-loin-with-poached-plums.name: Roasted Pork Loin With Poached Plums

ingredients.item: Sweet firm red or black plums (such as burgundies
ingredients.prep: Satsumas, or El Dorados; about 2 pounds), quartered, pitted

ingredients.item: Fresh thyme sprigs plus 1 teaspoon finely chopped thyme

instructions: Combine first 5 ingredients and 1/4 cup sugar in heavy large saucepan; bring to boil, stirring until sugar dissolves. Reduce heat; simmer until plums are tender, about 20 minutes. Transfer plums to platter. Strain wine mixture.

Return strained liquid to same saucepan. Add broth, thyme sprigs, and shallot. Boil until mixture is reduced to 1 cup, about 25 minutes. Strain sauce; stir in 1 1/4 teaspoons sugar and chopped thyme. Season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover plums and sauce separately; chill. Bring plums to room temperature; rewarm sauce over medium heat.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Brush pork with 1 tablespoon oil; sprinkle with thyme, garlic, salt, and pepper. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork and cook until brown on all sides, turning often, about 5 minutes.

Transfer skillet to oven, and roast pork until thermometer inserted into center registers 60°C, about 20 minutes. Remove skillet from oven and let pork stand 10 minutes. Cut pork crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices. Serve with poached plums and sauce. Sprinkle with chopped chives.

root-veggie-bake.name: Root Veggie Bake

ingredients.prep: cut into 3/4-inch slices, then into thirds

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).

Combine red onions, carrots, sweet potatoes, and rutabaga in a large bowl. Pour in olive oil and butter. Add curry powder, turmeric, salt, and cumin; toss until thoroughly coated. Transfer to a large baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven, uncovered, until almost tender, 20 to 30 minutes. Toss. Continue baking until vegetables are fork-tender, 20 to 30 minutes more.

rosemary-swordfish-skewers-with-sweet-pe.name: Rosemary Swordfish Skewers With Sweet Pepper Salad

ingredients.prep: 2 sliced into 1/4” rounds, 2 cut into strips
cut in half lengthwise, thinly sliced, soaked in ice water

instructions: Build a medium fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to medium-high. (Alternatively, heat a grill pan over medium-high heat.) Bring oil and garlic to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat and cook until garlic is toasted and light golden brown, about 6 minutes (remove from heat if garlic is cooking too quickly). Pour oil through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl and let cool. (The garlic could burn if left in the oil.) Reserve garlic chips for garnish.
Combine peppers, onion, jalapeño, vinegar, and 1/4 cup garlic oil in a large bowl. Add arugula; toss to coat. Season salad with salt and pepper. Let stand for 10 minutes.
Place 3–4 cubes swordfish on each skewer. Brush fish with remaining garlic oil; sprinkle with rosemary and season with salt and pepper.
Grill swordfish until just opaque in the center and lightly browned in spots, about 2 minutes on each of the 4 sides.
Divide salad among plates. Place a skewer atop each. Garnish with garlic chips and lemon quarters for squeezing over.

rotisserie-chicken-salad-with-charred-sc.name: Rotisserie Chicken Salad With Charred Scallion Dressing

ingredients.prep: meat pulled from bones and shredded

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C. Toss bread and 3 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Bake until golden and crisp around the edges, 8–12 minutes; let croutons cool.

Meanwhile, separate scallion whites from greens. Finely chop whites; place in a large bowl. Finely chop greens. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a small skillet over medium. Cook greens, stirring often, until blackened around edges and crisp, about 3 minutes. Scrape into bowl with whites, then whisk in lemon juice, vinegar, mustard, and mayonnaise; season with salt and pepper. Gradually whisk in remaining 6 Tbsp. oil.
Pour half of dressing into a small bowl; set aside. Add chicken, radishes, and croutons to bowl with remaining dressing and toss to coat.

Arrange lettuce and half of avocado on a platter; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with 3 Tbsp. reserved dressing; top with chicken salad. Tuck remaining avocado around; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with remaining dressing.

rustic-chicken-rub.name: Rustic Chicken Rub
instructions: Blend brown sugar, cilantro, tarragon, salt, basil, onion powder, garlic powder, dried lemon zest, parsley, black pepper, and paprika together in a food processor until well-combined. Store in an airtight container.

rustic-spaghetti-salad.name: Rustic Spaghetti Salad
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook spaghetti in boiling water until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes; drain. Transfer spaghetti to a large bowl.

Drizzle spaghetti with olive oil; toss to coat. Add anchovy fillets, garlic, balsamic vinegar, lemon juice, pepper flakes, and black pepper; mix well. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap; refrigerate until chilled, about 30 minutes.
